_meta.note: Data table for bin/route.mjs (model routing). Editable: change the tier of a role or the model an (profile, tier) pair resolves to without touching code. Models are Claude dispatch aliases (opus/sonnet/haiku/fable) - stable, not dated ids, so no staleness. Effort is fixed per role in agent frontmatter; escalating a low-effort role swaps to its `escalate_effort_variant` agent file.
_meta.tiers: light < standard < heavy (order used for difficulty bumps and clamping)
_meta.aliases: model_aliases is the accepted vocabulary for a `model.overrides.<role>` pin. `fable` is deliberately absent from the profile matrix: the profiles are a capability ladder, and placing fable on a rung would assert a ranking against opus/sonnet/haiku that is not established. It is reachable only by explicit pin, which is a user assertion, not ours.

files.note: phase/plan touches >= this many files -> +1 tier
